channel.title: Reverse Shell on 0kxwizard
channel.description: Recent content in Reverse Shell on 0kxwizard

item.title: PowerShell File Transfer & Stealth Execution: Upload, Run, and Evade Detection
item.description: Introduction My first project in my career? No. but my first blog on a project. During the weekends, one of my colleagues Melvin Awuku sent me a powershell script claiming that it can bypass Windows Defender and most basic anti-viruses and give us a reverse shell.sound great? isn’t it? who will not be happy to try such a powerful script since most Metasploit Payloads can’t bypass windows Defender. Though i planned to get some rest during the weekend but i rushed home with curiosity and turned on my laptop to test the script.

item.title: PowerShell File Transfer & Stealth Execution: Upload, Run, and Evade Detection
item.description: Introduction My first project in my career? No. but my first blog on a project. During the weekends, one of my colleagues Melvin Awuku sent me a powershell script claiming that it can bypass Windows Defender and most basic anti-viruses and give us a reverse shell.sound great? isn’t it? who will not be happy to try such a powerful script since most Metasploit Payloads can’t bypass windows Defender. Though i planned to get some rest during the weekend but i rushed home with curiosity and turned on my laptop to test the script.
